decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id is corridor_nostrand-avenue. The observation's source (201110_nostrand_cb17_slides) is already listed in the registry record corridor_nostrand-avenue's source_ids. This observation resolves to its own base_record_id — the matching record is itself (corridor_nostrand-avenue covers Nostrand Avenue/Rogers Avenue from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay at 9.3 miles). Per the rules, when the closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is 'new' — the observation already belongs there.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Nostrand Ave/Rogers Ave Corridor. 9.3 miles from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay.
